340002.name: Mission Hospital
340002.bannerNote: Not under Immediate Jeopardy as of Mar 4, 2026 (4th IJ removed after Enhanced Plan of Correction).

ij.note: Four IJs since 2019 HCA sale; cleared Mar 4, 2026. Sourced from CMS/NCDHHS Form 2567 reporting.

staffRatio.note: CMS HCRIS S-3 Part I line 14: employees on payroll FTEs (col 10) ÷ beds (col 2); FY ends Sept. FY2019 uses the post-sale report (02/01/2019–09/30/2019; pre-sale stub Oct–Jan was 7.4). FY2025 pending CMS processing.

travelers.nationalSource: Vander Weerdt et al., Health Care Manage Rev. 2023;48(4):352-362 (travel nurses typically ~3–4% of hospital nursing staff; midpoint 3.5% plotted). Also cited in AHRQ PSNet and Asheville Watchdog coverage.
travelers.note: Travel RN headcounts from Asheville Watchdog (not audited Worksheet S-3). % = travelers ÷ (travelers + filled permanent RNs). Sep 2023: 352 travelers (mid-Sep) with Oct 19, 2023 vacancy snapshot (452 openings / ~27% of ~1,674 bargaining-unit RN positions ⇒ ~1,222 filled; total ~1,574 ≈ 22%). Feb 2024: 376 travelers (Feb 4) with Feb 5 vacancies (302 / ~19% ⇒ ~1,287 filled; total ~1,663 ≈ 23%). Dec 2025: ~527 travelers + ~1,500 FT from staffing lists ≈ 2,027 (~26%). National benchmark line at 3.5% (typical ~3–4%; Vander Weerdt et al., Health Care Manage Rev. 2023).

starTrend.note: 2018–2024 compiled from CMS archive analyses (Asheville Watchdog / public CMS); 2025 from current CMS HCAHPS release.

overallTrend.note: CMS Care Compare Hospital overall rating from archived Hospital General Information releases (Oct/Nov each year; 2026 from May 2026 extract).

starTrend.note: CMS HCAHPS summary star rating from Parigrado CMS archive theme snapshots (Oct/Nov each year; 2026 from May 2026 extract).

overallTrend.note: CMS Care Compare Hospital overall rating from archived Hospital General Information releases (Oct/Nov each year; 2026 from May 2026 extract).
